content: Only used 4 arith despite having 9 and 12 arith respectively

His Lvl 1 Soulforge Aptitude ends with: `..."Bloodline of Heresy" additionally deal 100% DMG.`
Previewing the Lvl 2 text, it ends with: `..."Bloodline of Heresy" additionally deal 11% DMG.`

I think that's supposed to say 110% DMG. Or the first one should say 10%

saya活动给的蒲公英背景没了

提示“副本状态错误”可以重启下游戏试试看~
明著無視手牌上限簡直把忘卻篇劇情增益卡都比下去了，莉莉躲藏黯然失色，極夜微光黯淡無光
龐托斯二費生成的增益卡爆牌時送入抽牌堆而不會撕卡，其他人可以跟進嗎

打列車打到一半突然閃現回桌面（圖一）幾次重開遊戲都會開屏就是圖一的樣子（背景圖跑掉）
重開好幾次終於正常後 想回到列車一直顯示圖二 按了確認就回到圖一了 導致我現在進不了列車不能取消探索不能重開列車

我這裡也有(舉手)

You guys are experiencing it as well?
Seems like a server outage caused these issues — we're working on it right now...<:Nymph_dead:1356082627509092372>
Confirmed, we overloaded the servers with player numbers
This made me happy for some reason because this made me know people truly love this game like I do 😭😭😭
But I feel for the staffs they work hard

It would help if songs in Phonograph had, uh, the slider thingie that lets you go back and forth, the one most MP4 players have (professional choice of words, I know). 
Sometimes listening to the entire song might not be desirable, imagine someone who likes the last 3 minutes of that 12 minute song in "Play of Interwoven Fates", or someone who wants to show a certain moment of the song without it taking 5 minutes for no reason. 
<:Coalsie_shock:1516192103846383838>
Thanks for the suggestion — I'll submit it along with the other phonograph-related ones.<:Hameln_love:1468257934348783749>
GRamona seems to be able to create Fleeting-less Gaunts from her exalt if you've played them last round. I also had her create an Insight though I didn't screencap it.
